data.title: Meteora: DAMM V2 now features transaction fee calculation based on market capitalization.
data.description: Meteora announced on its X platform that DAMM V2 has launched market capitalization-based transaction fees. This feature will allow transaction fees to gradually decrease as projects grow, supporting long-term sustainability and deterring snipers. Meteora added that creators, deployers, and launchers on the platform can now define custom fee curves based on market capitalization to support every stage of the token's lifecycle.

data.title: Former Alameda CEO Caroline Ellison Set for Release in January 2026
data.description:
Former Alameda co-CEO Caroline Ellison is set for release on Jan. 21, 2026, about 10 months earlier than her full sentence.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/former-alameda-ceo-caroline-ellison-set-for-release-in-january-2026/

data.title: Opinion: The strong rebound in BTC market share has caused altcoins to suffer losses; as long as BTC remains the "safest" asset, the altcoin season will not arrive.
data.description: Crypto data analyst CyrilXBT wrote on the X platform that BTC.D (BTC market share) has rebounded strongly from its support level, which is the reason for the sluggish performance of the altcoin market. As long as BTC market share remains high, altcoins will continue to bleed money. Currently, every BTC pullback leads to funds continuing to flow into BTC rather than altcoins. The altcoin season will only begin when BTC is no longer the safest trading instrument, and it is not yet approaching.

data.title: The LAB team transferred 3.506 million tokens, worth approximately $400,000, from their wallet to a centralized exchange.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, the LAB team wallet transferred 3.506 million tokens, worth approximately $400,000, to two cryptocurrency exchanges, Gate and Bitget, 50 minutes ago, which appears to be a sale transaction. The wallet currently holds 61.309 million LAB tokens.

data.title: Analysts: Q4 of this year saw the worst performance for crypto markets in recent years, making a sell-side strategy suitable at this time.
data.description: Adam, a macro researcher at Greeks.live, posted on the X platform that 267,000 BTC options are expiring, with a put-call ratio of 0.35, a maximum price threshold of $95,000, and a notional value of $23.6 billion. 1.28 million ETH options are expiring, with a put-call ratio of 0.45, a maximum price threshold of $3,100, and a notional value of $3.71 billion. This year's expiration dates are the largest in history for cryptocurrency options, with nearly $28 billion worth of options expiring. Bitcoin and Ethereum prices fell sharply in the fourth quarter, only stabilizing at the end of the year. Currently, BTC has fallen below the $90,000 mark, and ETH has fallen below the $3,000 mark, with four consecutive months of decline, indicating a relatively weak market sentiment. Looking at the main options data, implied volatility has been affected by factors such as decreased volatility and the Christmas holidays. BTC's main term IV averages around 40%, and ETH's main term IV is around 60%, both at moderate levels this year. More than half of the options were settled today. Before settlement, the volume and proportion of large-volume option transactions continued to rise, mainly due to the demand for rollover. After settlement, quarterly options expiring in March were the largest open interest, accounting for more than 30% of the total open interest, mainly out-of-the-money call options. The market in the fourth quarter of this year can be said to be the worst in recent years. Due to the cyclical factors and slow development of the industry, market sentiment was poor, making sell-side strategies more suitable.

data.title: Binance Spot Wheel of Fortune Offers HOME Token Airdrops
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, users can participate in the Binance Spot Wheel of Fortune, an event designed to reward participants with HOME token airdrops. The activity is scheduled to run from 2025-12-26 08:00 (UTC) to 2026-01-09 08:00 (UTC). Participants can earn spins by completing various tasks, which can then be used to spin the wheel for a chance to win multiple rewards, including over 10,000,000 HOME tokens.

To participate, users must first visit the designated landing page and sign in to their Binance account. During the activity period, completing specific tasks will earn users a corresponding number of spin attempts. These tasks include trading a minimum of $200 on any non-zero-fee spot trading pairs to unlock one spin, $1,000 for four spins, and $3,000 for ten spins. Additionally, new spot traders can unlock spins by depositing at least 100 USDC or trading $100 on eligible pairs. Referral tasks are also available, allowing users to earn spins by referring friends who trade at least $100 on non-zero-fee pairs.

Binance has implemented a risk check mechanism to ensure fair play, and users identified as risk users will be excluded from receiving airdrops. All rewards will be distributed within 48 hours after the activity ends. It is important to note that the actual value of rewards may fluctuate due to market conditions. Binance reserves the right to amend the terms and conditions of the activity at any time, including changes to eligibility criteria and the list of eligible countries. Participants are encouraged to stay informed about any updates to ensure compliance with the activity's rules.

data.title: Dollar Index DXY Reaches 98 with Slight Daily Increase
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the Dollar Index (DXY) has risen to 98, marking a daily increase of 0.04%.

data.title: Beware of scams impersonating the "Hong Kong Stock Exchange," which can lure you into depositing funds only to find you unable to withdraw them.
data.description: A netizen reported that their family member fell victim to a scam impersonating the official website of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. After depositing money, they initially withdrew successfully four times, each time HK$100. Subsequently, the system prompted that taxes needed to be paid before further withdrawals could be made, and that the account would be frozen if taxes were not paid on time. The netizen has reported the incident to the police. The Paper's investigation found that the website is currently inaccessible. The Hong Kong Stock Exchange has issued a warning regarding such impersonation scams, and currently lists over 400 suspicious websites. However, the fake website named "Hong Kong Stablecoin Exchange (HSEX)" is still accessible. Its page design is highly similar to legitimate trading platforms, displaying cryptocurrency and virtual currency price fluctuations and offering deposit and withdrawal functions. (The Paper)

data.title: Putin: The US has expressed interest in conducting cryptocurrency mining near the Zaporizhia nuclear power plant.
data.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin told a businessperson in a late-night meeting on December 24 that Russia might be open to exchanging controlled portions of Ukrainian territory, but he demanded the entire Donbas region. Putin also addressed the management of the Zaporizhia nuclear power plant, stating that joint Russian-American management was under discussion. Furthermore, Putin revealed that the US had expressed interest in conducting cryptocurrency mining near the Zaporizhia plant, which is intended to supply some of Ukraine with electricity. (Reuters)

data.title: Hong Kong Exchange Scam Alert: Fake Website Targets Users
data.description:
According to Odaily, a user reported that their family member fell victim to a scam involving a fake 'Hong Kong Exchange' website. Initially, they were able to withdraw funds successfully four times, each time amounting to 100 yuan. However, the system later demanded a tax payment to continue withdrawals, threatening to freeze the account if the tax was not paid. The victim has since reported the incident to the police. 

Upon investigation, it was found that the fraudulent webpage is currently inaccessible. In response to such impersonation scams, the official Hong Kong Exchange website has issued a warning. The exchange has identified over 400 suspicious websites, although a fake site named 'Hong Kong Stablecoin Exchange (HSEX)' remains accessible. This site closely mimics legitimate trading platforms, displaying cryptocurrency and virtual currency market trends and offering deposit and withdrawal functions.

data.title: Putin Considers Territorial Exchange for Ukraine Agreement
data.description: According to PANews, Russian President Vladimir Putin indicated on December 24 that Russia might consider exchanging control of certain territories to reach an agreement with Ukraine, provided that Donbas remains under Russian control. He also mentioned ongoing discussions between Russia and the United States regarding joint management of the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant, noting U.S. interest in cryptocurrency mining in the region. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky denied accepting any proposals to cede Donbas or Zaporizhzhia during talks with the United States.

data.description:
A widely followed crypto analyst believes that Bitcoin (BTC) is printing a similar 2020 bullish pattern. In a new thread, pseudonymous crypto trader Kaleo tells his 728,400 followers on X that Bitcoin may increase by more than 60% its current value next year.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/12/26/crypto-trader-says-bitcoin-price-following-2020-bullish-pattern-only-a-matter-of-time-before-btc-narrative-changes/

data.title: Trust Wallet Browser Extension Breach Drains $7 Million in User Funds
data.description:
Trust Wallet has confirmed a serious security breach tied to its browser extension, after attackers exploited a vulnerability that led to roughly $7 million in stolen user funds. The incident was tightly scoped but severe, with losses unfolding rapidly and affecting users across multiple blockchains.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/trust-wallet-browser-extension-breach-drains-7-million-in-user-funds/

data.title: Matrixport: The crypto market may be shifting from a phase where downside risks outweigh upside potential, while upside still requires catalysts.
data.description: Matrixport released its latest weekly report, stating that Bitcoin has been on a downward trend since mid-October 2025, with market sentiment becoming more cautious. With the "four-year cycle" narrative resurfacing, most traders expect Bitcoin to remain under pressure in 2026. Key Observations: In recent months, Bitcoin has continued to be under pressure in an environment of converging volatility, deleveraging, and a lack of risk appetite. From the perspective of derivatives, ETFs, and technical indicators, the market positioning structure has changed. The largest Bitcoin options expiring in history is about to expire, and the strike price distribution has become an important indicator for observing market pressure and opportunities. Market Outlook: The market usually tends to be conservative at the end of the year, and the risk appetite of funds declines. After entering the new year, with the reallocation of funds and the recovery of risk budgets, market sentiment may accelerate its reversal. The technical structure shows that the downward momentum has slowed down marginally, but the upward trend has not yet formed a clear consensus. The market may be shifting from a stage of "downside risk is dominant" to a stage of "downside is limited, and upward movement still needs catalysts". The current Bitcoin price and weekly stochastic indicator show that the market may have entered the oversold zone. The stochastic indicator has dropped to the 17% level. The crypto market may be shifting from a stage of "downside risk is dominant" to a stage of "downside is limited, and upward movement still needs catalysts".

data.title: JPMorgan's 2026 US Equity Core Recommendation List: Crypto Sector Absent, Only Google Remains Among the Seven AI Giants
data.description: Crypto researcher @DtDt666 posted on the X platform that JPMorgan Chase released its core recommended US stock picks for 2026, comprising 47 stocks. All crypto-related stocks were omitted, including mining stocks such as Coinbase, MicroStrategy, and Bitmine. Furthermore, only Google from the AI ​​Big Seven made the list, while the other six tech giants—Nvidia, Tesla, Meta, Apple, Microsoft, and Amazon—were not included.

data.title: BDXN project-related addresses deposited $400,000 worth of BDXN tokens into multiple exchanges.
data.description: According to onchainschool.pro, about three hours ago, three wallet addresses associated with the BDXN project deposited approximately $400,000 worth of BDXN into multiple exchanges. These tokens were transferred out of the project's wallet about two months ago, and the addresses involved are as follows: 0xD5682dcA35D78c13b5103eB85c46cDCe28508dfB; 0xD0Fc2894Dd2fe427a05980c2E3De8B7A89CB2672; 0xAc245a570A914C84300f24a07eb59425bbdC1B48.

data.title: The largest Bitcoin options trade to date is about to settle, with an overall bullish bias.
data.description: Bitcoin will see its largest options expiration date today at 4 PM, with approximately 300,000 BTC options contracts (with a notional value of about $23.7 billion) expiring. The combined expiration of BTC and ETH options today totals $28.5 billion, double that of the same period last year. Analysts point out that this expiration date is exceptionally large and generally bullish. The maximum pain point (the price level at which option buyers incur the greatest loss and sellers the greatest profit) is $96,000, which will reinforce the upward price trend.
